ImageDescription.value: Deputy Secretary of State for Management and Resources Heather Higginbottom poses for a photo with renowned primatologist and conservationist, Dr. Jane Goodall, and Elizabeth Jordan, Director of the State Department’s Office of Global Health Diplomacy, before Dr. Goodall discussed the Jane Goodall Institute (JGI)’s work promoting health, gender equality, and conservation at the U.S. Department of State in Washington, D.C., on October 27, 2015. [State Department photo/ Public Domain]

Credit.value: Deputy Secretary Higginbottom Poses for a Photo With Dr. Jane Goodall and the State Department's Global Health Diplomacy Director Jordan in Washington

Artist.value: U.S. Department of State from United States
